programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the 1981 NFC Championship Game matchup between the Dallas Cowboys and the San Francisco 49ers where San Francisco wide receiver Dwight Clark helped the 49ers to defeat the Cowboys, 28-27.

programme.title: NFL Films Presents
programme.desc: Philadelphia Eagles head coach Doug Pederson and quarterback Nick Foles, made a bold call on fourth and goal in Super Bowl LII, by going with Philly Special. This is the story behind that bold call!

programme.title: NFL Film Session
programme.desc: Doug Pederson joins Ron Jaworski and Brian Baldinger in the first installment of NFL Game Pass Film Session.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.sub-title: LII: Philadelphia Eagles vs. New England Patriots
programme.desc: Nick Foles and the underdog Eagles battle with the defending Super Bowl champion Patriots in a memorable matchup as the Eagles triumph and win their first championship in franchise history. From Feb. 4, 2018.

programme.title: NFL Draft
programme.sub-title: Jordan Mailata's Journey From Australian Rugby League to Eagles Draft Pick
programme.desc: Meet Jordan Mailata, the 6-foot-8, 345-pound former rugby league player from Sydney, Australia. Jordan has left a successful career in Australia to try and achieve the impossible - making an NFL roster, with no knowledge or previous experience.

programme.title: NFL Media Originals
programme.sub-title: Mini Movie: Inside Mac Jones' Rookie Season
programme.desc: New England Patriots quarterback Mac Jones had an impressive rookie season. See the best moments from his 22-TD, 3801-yard year.

programme.title: NFL Events
programme.desc: Former NFL linebacker and Super Bowl champion Scott Fujita traces his family history in the U.S. back to Japanese internment during World War II.

programme.title: NFL 360
programme.desc: Three players risk their lives to save others, an NFL hopeful has a transformational experience in Japan, and Joshua Dobbs forms a close bond with a young cancer survivor.

programme.title: NFL 360
programme.desc: The Kahuku High School Red Raiders honor the memory of three fallen coaches and their Polynesian heritage by bringing a state championship to Hawaii's North Shore of Oahu.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classic Games
programme.sub-title: Super Bowl LI: Patriots vs. Falcons
programme.desc: Relive the Super Bow LI matchup between the New England Patriots and the Atlanta Falcons by watching the New England Patriots rally from being down 25 points.

programme.title: America's Game
programme.desc: The journey of the 2016 New England Patriots through the regular season and on to the Super Bowl.
